testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //a[contains(@class,'Check_out')], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(@class,'Check_out')]"}.
